title: Tunisian Smoked Chicken Tagine
description: Hearty and aromatic stew made with smoked chicken, sweet potatoes, and Tunisian spices.

ingredients.name: Tunisian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing chicken and sweet potates

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Tunisian Spice Blend and Smoked Paprika.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken thighs, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken thighs until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pot.
Add the diced sweet potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the pot and add enough water to cover the bottom of the pot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sweet potatoes are tender.
Garnish with chopped onion and serve hot.
